calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Kenyette Jones, Esq. for Plaintiff: James De Soto Bail Bonds.
Plaintiff's witness James De Soto was present, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Jade Yuming Kung and Fu Di Cai.
Defendants' Default entered - 11/30/07.
Doe Defendants dismissed - 11/30/07.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Jade Yuming Kung & Fu Di Cai as follows:
Damages/Principal $75,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $12,238.77
Attorney's Fees $15,000.00
Costs $1,023.15, for a total of $103,351.92.
Judgment signed in open court.
